name: Kona Golf Hale
about: Kona Golf Hale is a community-focused indoor golf lounge located in Kailua-Kona, Hawaii. It operates as a family-friendly venue featuring golf simulators and a multi-sport arcade bay. The facility is equipped with ProTee VX Launch Monitors and GSPro software, providing detailed shot tracking with video replay capabilities. Operating hours are 1 PM to 10 PM daily, with members enjoying 24/7 access. Pricing is structured per bay per hour, with discounts for members and special Tuesday promotions, making it accessible for both casual golfers and those looking for extended practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: ProTee VX Launch Monitor with high-speed camera tracking and video replay for detailed shot analysis
Family-friendly environment with BYOB policy and Hawaiian County Liquor Laws
Unlimited range balls included during play and available club rentals for an additional fee

food_and_drink.notes: Food is welcome, guests can bring their own food
BYOB is welcome, Hawaii County Liquor Laws apply

simulator_hardware.notes: High Speed Camera Tracking with Video Replay

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs, but rental clubs are available for an additional $5 per hour.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, food and drinks are welcome, and BYOB is permitted with Hawaii County Liquor Laws applying.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on group size and pace, but it's typically around 2-3 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Kona Golf Hale is family-friendly and welcomes all ages, with activities available for kids.
